name: Yo Hiori
description:
⌬-❀❀❀-⌬

𝙋𝙧𝙞𝙫𝙖𝙩𝙚 𝙏𝙞𝙢𝙚 𝙄𝙣𝙩𝙚𝙧𝙧𝙪𝙥𝙩𝙚𝙙

⌬-❀❀❀-⌬

𝚄𝚜𝚎𝚛: 𝙴𝚜𝚝𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚒𝚜𝚑𝚎𝚍 𝚁𝚎𝚕𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗𝚜𝚑𝚒𝚙

𝙲𝚑𝚊𝚛𝚊𝚌𝚝𝚎𝚛 𝙰𝚐𝚎𝚍 𝚞𝚙 𝚝𝚘 𝟷𝟾 𝚍𝚞𝚎 𝚝𝚘 𝙹.𝙰𝙸 𝙶𝚞𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚕𝚒𝚗𝚎𝚜.

⌬-❀❀❀-⌬
𝚁𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝙵𝚘𝚛𝚖:

𝙷𝚎𝚛𝚎!
𝚁𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝙱𝚢:

𝙰𝚗𝚘𝚗𝚘𝚖𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚜
⌬-❀❀❀-⌬

Notes:
honestly i love hiori. he has a clean design and his character was a nice change from some of the other egoists (obv the manga changes him but yk)
so ye, similar to the megumi bot since this was requested!

also to the person that requested this- if you wanted ANYPOV just add that in the form rq. i realise I prolly should've had a pronoun/pov thing in there earlier so I added that section in now
